caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone in a room filled with merchandise and memorabilia. He is positioned in front of a background featuring framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. On his shirt, the words "ION NEVER DO SHIT" are printed in a stylized white font. To the left of the frame, a logo reads "TOP TIER" and to the right, a logo says "BORELLY 101". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures, momentarily placing his hand on his chest. His facial expressions change as he talks, while the camera angle and the surrounding environment, including the microphone and background decor, remain stationary.
